title: giga chad 3d totem
description: A simple 3D custom Totem of Undying replacement, fully compatible with Minecraft 1.21 and above.
body:
Custom 3D GigaChad Totem is a stylized Minecraft resource pack that replaces the default Totem of Undying with a custom 3D GigaChad-themed totem.
This pack is designed for players who want a unique, bold, and meme-inspired visual upgrade while keeping the vanilla Minecraft feel intact.
✨ Features
Custom 3D Totem of Undying
Inspired by the GigaChad meme
Clean textures with smooth in-game appearance
Lightweight & performance-friendly
Works in survival, PvP, and SMP
🛠 Creation Process
Base Minecraft skin was generated using Minecraft's official skin system
The totem texture was manually edited, recolored, and customized by me
3D model adjustments and texture refinements were done to create a unique look
📜 Credits & Attribution
GigaChad meme concept belongs to its respective creators
Minecraft is a trademark of Mojang Studios
Skin-to-totem conversion tools used follow their publicly available terms
All additional edits, customization, and final packaging were done by me (anshu078).
